title: Office of Naval Research
description: ONR is committed to attracting and retaining the best and the brightest talent to meet the advanced needs of the U.S. Navy and Marine Corps.
text:
Work for ONR
At ONR, our mission is both unique and exciting: We drive the discovery, development and deployment of cutting-edge technology for the U.S. Navy and Marine Corps. Our team, comprised of renowned scientists, engineers and researchers, advances the science and technology essential for safety and mission success for our Sailors and Marines, and provides them with strategic advantages to defend our Nation.
We are committed to fostering a workforce that helps us meet this mission.
